name: Roman Pyatifan
description:
new acquaintances

ㅤ

You have moved from the city to a small rural town, and no sooner have you arrived than you find yourself unlucky enough to cross paths with the school's main bully.

For one reason or another (you may invent it yourself), you were forced to relocate to this town. But country folk are not particularly fond of city dwellers.

ㅤ

ㅤ

! The bot has been UPDATED.

What's new? The bot's description has been updated, as has the opening post.

ㅤ

Warning: All characters are 18 years of age or older! I am aware that this is not the canonical age of the characters from the Tiny bunny fandom, but I simply have no right to upload characters younger than 18. Your character must also have reached the age of 18.
